name: Nasdaq, Inc.
description: Nasdaq, Inc. is an American multinational financial services corporation that operates as a leading technology company serving capital markets and other industries worldwide. The company provides data, analytics, software, exchange capabilities, and advisory services to corporate clients, investment managers, banks, brokers, and exchange operators. Headquartered in New York City, Nasdaq plays a critical role in the global financial system by offering premier platforms and services that facilitate capital formation, transparency, and efficiency across global markets through its diverse segments, including Capital Access Platforms, Financial Technology, and Market Services.
